description_long: This object is a classic AK-style rifle featuring a combination of wood and metal construction. The stock, handguard, and pistol grip are made from a reddish-brown wood with visible grain patterns, while the receiver, barrel, and other functional components are matte black metal. The rifle has a curved, detachable magazine in a lighter tan color, and standard iron sights are mounted on the top. The barrel is long and slender, ending with a simple muzzle device. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, typical of rifles intended for durability and reliability in urban environments.
description: A classic AK-style rifle with wood furniture, black metal receiver and barrel, and a curved tan magazine.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the wood stock, handguard, and curved magazine.
description_view_1: Front-on view showing the narrow profile of the barrel and the alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wood grain and the magazine's curvature, similar to view 0 but mirrored.
description_view_3: Rear-on view showing the width of the stock and the top of the receiver.
